title: Bridge Guard Duck
prompt: A stern duck blocks the only bridge across the swamp.

title: Glowing Clearing
prompt: Fireflies swirl around a mossy stone covered in runes.

title: Lost Map
prompt: Your map is smudged; a sage duck appears, offering a trade.

title: Feather Market
prompt: A pop-up bazaar run by ducks sells charms and shiny feathers.

title: Storm Warning
prompt: Clouds roll in; trees begin to whistle ominously.

title: Hidden Raft
prompt: You spot a raft tangled in reeds with a duck flag.
